title: News from the Beacon - July 12, 2026
description: Your ~3-minute signal from the long tail - the specific threads the front page skips. This issue: the Supreme Court blocks the firing of a Fed governor (and the shadow-docket fight underneath it), Anthropic seats former Fed chair Ben Bernanke as Claude Sonnet 5 ships, a deepening PLA purge that analysts say may be pushing back Beijing's Taiwan timetable, TSMC's 2nm capacity sold out, Louisiana's whooping cranes raising pasta-named chicks in the crawfish fields, Subnautica 2's Adaptive Measures update, and a goblin shark filmed alive in the wild for the first time. First officer, out.
